ShaderNodePreset.Description: Animated sci-fi HUD overlay. Camera locked to screen. All elements independently enabled and colour-controlled.
ShaderNodePreset.Name: BB_FutureHUD

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow width — larger values give softer, broader glow on the rings
Uniform.Name: ring_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation speed multiplier for all rings
Uniform.Name: ring_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Overall opacity of the ring glow
Uniform.Name: rings_opacity

Uniform.Tooltip: Ring cross-section thickness — higher values give thicker, chunkier rings
Uniform.Name: ring_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring0_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring0_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring1_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring1_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring2_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring2_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring3_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring3_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring4_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring4_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring5_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring5_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring6_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring6_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Outer bezel ring — 8 rotating ticks with counter-rotating dashed inner ring
Uniform.Name: ring7_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Depth multiplier — scales relative to master Depth
Uniform.Name: ring7_depth

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-ring speed multiplier. Negative values reverse rotation. Scaled by master Ring Speed.
Uniform.Name: ring7_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Speed of the Z-axis roll sine animation
Uniform.Name: cam_orbit_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: X-axis rotation — 0 = edge-on (flat rings), 45 = classic angled view, 90 = straight down
Uniform.Name: cam_tilt

Uniform.Tooltip: Y-axis rotation — orbits the camera left/right around the rings
Uniform.Name: cam_orbit_base

Uniform.Tooltip: Z-axis roll amplitude — rocks the camera around the view axis. Set to 0 to disable.
Uniform.Name: cam_orbit_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Rolling number readouts with orbital ring
Uniform.Name: ov_numbers_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Counter speed — 1 = real-time, 10 = 10x speed, negative = count down.
Uniform.Name: ov_numbers_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the stopwatch start value in seconds — independent of the global Time Offset on the Global Time page
Uniform.Name: ov_numbers_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Z rotation in degrees — rotates the element around its center
Uniform.Name: ov_numbers_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_numbers_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Left block set — 3 rows x 20 cols
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks0_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks0_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks0_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-width of the block frame — more columns appear as this grows, cell size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks0_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-height of the block frame — more rows appear as this grows, cell size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks0_height

Uniform.Tooltip: Right block set — 3 rows x 20 cols
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks1_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks1_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks1_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-width of the block frame — more columns appear as this grows, cell size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks1_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-height of the block frame — more rows appear as this grows, cell size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_blocks1_height

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows0_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows0_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-width of the arrow frame — more columns appear as this grows, arrow size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows0_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-height of the arrow frame — more rows appear as this grows, arrow size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows0_height

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows0_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows1_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows1_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-width of the arrow frame — more columns appear as this grows, arrow size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows1_width

Uniform.Tooltip: Half-height of the arrow frame — more rows appear as this grows, arrow size stays fixed
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows1_height

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_arrows1_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Scroll speed — controls how fast bars move across the screen.
Uniform.Name: ov_graph0_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Bounce speed — controls how fast bar widths oscillate independently of scrolling.
Uniform.Name: ov_graph0_bounce_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_graph0_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_graph0_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Scroll speed — controls how fast bars move across the screen.
Uniform.Name: ov_graph1_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Bounce speed — controls how fast bar widths oscillate independently of scrolling.
Uniform.Name: ov_graph1_bounce_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: ov_graph1_time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_graph1_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_circles0_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of instances placed at random screen positions
Uniform.Name: ov_circles0_number

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_circles0_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_circles1_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of instances placed at random screen positions
Uniform.Name: ov_circles1_number

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_circles1_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Animation speed multiplier — scales all internal rotation speeds together. Negative values reverse direction.
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Speed multiplier for the inner frame cutout rotation only. Negative reverses it relative to the outer. 0 = frozen inner.
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_inner_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Frequency of the corner arrow pulse oscillation. 0 = static arrows.
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_pulse_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Z rotation in degrees — rotates the element around its center
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Size of the corner arrow triangles
Uniform.Name: ov_rect_arrow_size

Uniform.Tooltip: Antenna static icon with cascade replication
Uniform.Name: ov_static_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of copies. Each copy N is placed at Pos*N, rotated by Rot*N, scaled by Scale^N.
Uniform.Name: ov_static_number

Uniform.Tooltip: Add a mirrored copy of the full cascade, flipped on the X axis
Uniform.Name: ov_static_mirror

Uniform.Tooltip: Scale step per copy — multiplicative. 1.0 = all copies same size. 1.2 = each copy 20% larger than the previous.
Uniform.Name: ov_static_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: X position step per copy. Copy N is placed at Pos X * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_static_pos_x

Uniform.Tooltip: Y position step per copy. Copy N is placed at Pos Y * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_static_pos_y

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation step per copy in degrees. Copy N is rotated by Rotate Z * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_static_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_static_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Side bracket decorations — 3-element group mirrored left and right, cascadable
Uniform.Name: ov_side_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of copies. Each copy N is placed at Pos*N, rotated by Rot*N, scaled by Scale^N. Each copy is a full mirrored group of 3 on both sides.
Uniform.Name: ov_side_number

Uniform.Tooltip: Scale step per copy — multiplicative. 1.0 = all copies same size.
Uniform.Name: ov_side_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: X position step per copy — shifts the mirror axis. Copy N placed at Pos X * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_side_pos_x

Uniform.Tooltip: Y position step per copy. Copy N placed at Pos Y * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_side_pos_y

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation step per copy in degrees. Copy N rotated by Rotate Z * N.
Uniform.Name: ov_side_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather — 0 = hard edge, higher values extend a soft halo outside the shape
Uniform.Name: ov_side_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Dense grid of tiny square dots, scrolling downward
Uniform.Name: bg_dots_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Grid density — higher values pack dots closer together
Uniform.Name: bg_dots_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation of the dot grid in degrees
Uniform.Name: bg_dots_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Grid of small crosses, scrolling downward
Uniform.Name: bg_crosses_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Grid density — higher values pack crosses closer together
Uniform.Name: bg_crosses_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation of the cross grid in degrees — also rotates the scroll direction
Uniform.Name: bg_crosses_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Grid of rotating square frame outlines, random CW/CCW per cell
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_enable

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation and scroll speed. Negative reverses direction.
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_speed

Uniform.Tooltip: Space between boxes — 0 = touching edges, higher = more gap
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_gap

Uniform.Tooltip: Cell size — higher values make each box larger
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: Rotation of the box grid in degrees — also rotates the scroll direction
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_rot

Uniform.Tooltip: Glow feather around each box frame
Uniform.Name: bg_boxes_glow

Uniform.Tooltip: Overall animation speed multiplier (1.0 = original speed at 25 fps)
Uniform.Name: time_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: Offset the animation start point in seconds
Uniform.Name: time_offset
